The Menu

Pick your swatch.

Hair Spa Cut, colour & conditioning with Aveda's plant-based line. Cut done exactly the way you want it. Men's cut $26 · Cut & style $50+ Colour & Highlights Subtle and natural or a full statement — foil, ombré or balayage, done without compromising the health of your hair. Full colour $100+ · Highlights $110+ Hair Extensions Tape-in extensions — comfortable, undetectable, 100% cuticle-intact human hair. Add volume and length. Call for pricing Skin Spa Aveda Aroma Facial to Micro Diamond Dermabrasion — noninvasive, skin-renewing treatments for real results. The Setting

A creek runs behind the antiques.

Maureen & the team

"You are our priority. A thorough consultation is key — indulge yourself in a relaxing, comfortable environment."

Owner Maureen and her stylists work as a team — from a men's cut to fixing hair another salon hacked. Aveda world-renowned products throughout, chosen because we hold your best interests and the planet close to our hearts.

A complimentary consultation before service ensures you get exactly what you came for, plus honest guidance on the products that'll keep the results going at home.

Drop a portrait — Maureen or the team

The quiet part we take seriously.

TLC meets the highest standards of sanitation. Cleanliness is part of the daily routine — every tool disinfected and all equipment sanitized before each service, to protect our most precious commodity: you.

4.6★ across 47 Google reviews

What Milford says.

★★★★★
"TLC Salon was an amazing experience. Maureen, the owner, and her staff are all wonderful. I was met at the door and introduced to all the stylists. The Salon is so cute, lots of antiques to look at and very warm and cozy. Maureen cut my hair EXACTLY the way I wanted it. I would give them 10 stars if I could. I will definitely be back!!"
Sarah Medlin-Shaw · 11 reviews
★★★★★
"Reasonable price. Maureen has been doing an amazing job trying to fix my hair after another salon literally hacked my hair."
Doreen B · 6 reviews · Hairstyling
★★★★★
"Love this salon! Great staff! Couldn't get a haircut for 6 months due to covid but Maureen made me feel like a new person after a perfect cut and blowout. Loved the relaxing atmosphere of the old home with the antiques. Made me feel like I was back in my grandmother's home again. Definitely recommend!"
Nona Murphy · Local Guide · 22 reviews
